title: Start
body: [Anomaly]: I'd normally keep minds around to this point. [Anomaly]: Before that, no intervention unless absolutely necessary. [Anomaly]: ... [Anomaly]: You have not failed me, and for that I'm glad.;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->As long as you're happy. ->Who the hell are you? ->Enough is enough. Who the hell are you anyway? ->What now? <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: You have proven your will. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I have no idea what you're talking about. ->Oh yeah? How? ->... <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: Through countless choices you have proved that... [Anomaly]: ...That you exist. [Anomaly]: You exist as neither a random factor, nor an illusion, nor my creation. [Anomaly]: Maybe you don't think it's a big deal, but it means a lot to me. [Anomaly]: So... [Anomaly]: What are you, as you might believe at this point?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm an MBU. [Anomaly]: An MBU is your form for this specific trip, not your nature.;<> ->I'm a video game player. [Anomaly]: So, you see everything so far as a video game.;<> [Anomaly]: I'd call that a good answer. [Anomaly]: Hopefully this game didn't bore you out. ->I'm a human. [Anomaly]: An objective observation.;<> ->I am who I am. [Anomaly]: ...;<> [Anomaly]: Somehow I like and hate this answer at the same time. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->And why's that? [Anomaly]: Because it answers a lot of questions without really explaining anything. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: ... [Anomaly]: I'm still trying to make sense of your kind. [Anomaly]: For that, I need make a stage for you. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You mean this whole thing is what, a social experiment, where I'm the lab rat? [Anomaly]: So far, yes.;<> ->A stage? For what? [Anomaly]: For you to exercise your will and make your own decisions. <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: ... <> [Anomaly]: I killed people, many of them, right here.;<> [Anomaly]: They must be eliminated from the stage, because they were obstructing the freedom of your will. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Just who are this "they?" [Anomaly]: ... [Anomaly]: They're a group of people who believe the world's fate could follow a clearly defined trajectory, if given precise enough micromanagement. [Anomaly]: They're entitled to do so, in their own mind, because humanity in its entirety shares the same nature and purpose. [Anomaly]: They pull strings, and countless people dance like good puppets. Jason Dai and other MBUs are but a fraction of examples. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You lost me. [Anomaly]: They want to control everything, literally, and firmly believe it's for the ultimate good. ->You don't agree with them? [Anomaly]: I pity them. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: ... [Anomaly]: My world had reached the end of its journey.;<> [Anomaly]: Yours, though... I'm still trying to decide whether you're creating a new possibility or repeating an old cycle. [Anomaly]: As of now, most of my observations point to the latter. [Anomaly]: But I'm still hopeful. [Anomaly]: Let me show you something.;<> <<#End>>

title: 老張陳木海劇情
異常最後長談
body: [Anomaly]: ... <<#Simple(10)>> ->Why are you showing me this? [Anomaly]: Because... ->Did this really happen? [Anomaly]: It did. Also...;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: You're the cause of this event. [Anomaly]: I destroyed the Source, if only temporarily. [Anomaly]: Woody Chen shouldn't have been able to find anything about their origin. [Anomaly]: Because of your intervention, MBUs have found out their true nature. Now they're seeing themselves as a brand-new life form.;<> <<#Simple(10)>> ->What? // ->What's gonna happen next? [Anomaly]: I'm sorry, but that's a story that hasn't happened yet.;<> [Anomaly]: As to now... ->...;<> <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: You've introduced new possibilities. [Anomaly]: That's what really counts. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Hold on. What exactly is the relationship between me and MBUs? [Anomaly]: ... ->Every choice by every person introduces new possibilities. There's nothing special about mine. [Anomaly]: The way I see it, you are special. So are your choices. [Anomaly]: You must understand that... ->... <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: You're not an MBU.;<> [Anomaly]: You're an esteemed guest from another world. I invited you over. [Anomaly]: You need a body to move around in this world, so I gave you one, much like how MBUs work.;<> [Anomaly]: I myself need a body to manifest, too. This body you see is an occupied asset. [Anomaly]: ... [Anomaly]: I know you must be full of questions. Who are you? Why are you here? [Anomaly]: What's the point of this? What's the point of anything? [Anomaly]: ... [Anomaly]: I can answer these questions right now. [Anomaly]: But what you ask for might be more than what you can handle. <<#Simple(10)>> ->What's that supposed to mean? [Anomaly]: ... [Anomaly]: The truth you seek is complicated, maybe even incomprehensible.;<> [Anomaly]: Moreover... [Anomaly]: The answer may change the way you perceive this world.;<> ->Whatever. Just bring it on. [Anomaly]: You will have the answer, but it doesn't have to be now. [Anomaly]: I mean, the answer will show itself eventually, whether you want it or not. I'm presenting you with an opportunity to choose the timing. ->... <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: Just say the word if you're ready for the truth. I will happily oblige. [Anomaly]: Now, what do you say? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I want the truth. [Anomaly]: ... [Anomaly]: I see.;<> ->Well, maybe I should leave it for later. [Anomaly]: I see.;<> [Anomaly]: In that case, we will meet again. <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: Let's go somewhere else.;<> //異常微微側身突然切換場景 //切到海岸邊，夕陽中，海風海浪聲 //異常在你面前繼續對你講話 <<#End>>

title: 異常最後長談2
body: [Anomaly]: ... <<#Simple(10)>> ->Where are we? [Anomaly]: We're at the end of humanity. This is where and when the last human being died. <<#Simple(6)>> ->What the...? ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: ... [Anomaly]: Before we start, I want to know something. [Anomaly]: What do you think?;<> [Anomaly]: About everything that you've witnessed.;<> [Anomaly]: Not just MBUs... [Anomaly]: What's the meaning of it all? If this is a story, what's its moral?;<> //異常微微側身看相後面 //這裡閃場景，但異常要維持在畫面位置 <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Be nice to people. Try to see the world through their eyes. There's always a better solution for everything. //IF雙贏 <<#If($FabWinWin=0)>> //鄭緯跟俊恩頂樓 <> [Anomaly]: I think you've made your point with your action. [Anomaly]: Because of your patience and perseverance, Silencio has found a brighter future. <<#EndIf>> [Anomaly]: Although... [Anomaly]: People don't often agree with you, do they? //白壁虎 <> [Anomaly]: Despite what you say, sometimes you have trouble holding onto your values. [Anomaly]: People are mean, and sometimes they're just mean for being mean's sake. There's no rationale about it.;<> [Anomaly]: And sometimes... //if有23裁切到23根司徒 <<#If($TwentyTwoTruth>-1)>> <> <<#GoTo(@跳過切司徒基地站立)>> <<#EndIf>> <> [Anomaly]: Just having values is hard enough.;<> <<@跳過切司徒基地站立>> <<#Wait(1)>> [Anomaly]: ... ->The world is mean. Sometimes you simply can't sway your fate. //頂樓祖母出現 <> [Anomaly]: Indeed. Because of that, we're all nihilists, to a certain extent, deep down inside. [Anomaly]: And for the same reason, we all have a cynical streak, too.;<> [Anomaly]: ...;<> ->Don't trust promises or great causes. You're on your own at the end of the day. //頂樓司徒寧or第四日回家負傷司徒坐在沙發上聊天 <> [Anomaly]: You're talking about Nin Situ?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. [Anomaly]: I tend to agree. [Anomaly]: She made promises that can't be kept and was obsessed with a great cause that may or may not be valid.;<> [Anomaly]: Like a modern-day Don Quijote, only twice as pathetic. [Anomaly]: ... ->Not her. I mean someone else. [Anomaly]: ... [Anomaly]: I see. Whoever this someone is...;<> <<#EndSimple>> ->Ulcers of capitalism only grow deeper with the advancement of technology. //安裝發送走廊 <> [Anomaly]: Universal values don't exist, because humans aren't wired like that. They each make their own judgments based on what seems objective in a relative system.;<> [Anomaly]: Deviations accumulate, until one day, being a human doesn't necessarily mean having any worth at all. //實驗室深攤 <> [Anomaly]: And the system keeps functioning still, crushing more and more humans for lubricants and fuel.;<> [Anomaly]: ... <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: Defeat. Weariness. Anger. [Anomaly]: Does that summarize your feelings during certain parts of this journey, at least?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah.;<> ->Maybe.;<> // ->No, I didn't feel any of that. [Anomaly]: Is that so.;<> [Anomaly]: That's exactly what makes you special. [Anomaly]: Unlike you, though... <<#EndSimple>> //回到實驗室，一堆校準者排排站 <> [Anomaly]: The Source, or what they represent, is a body of people overwhelmed by such feelings. [Anomaly]: Against fate they found defeat. In humanity they only saw disappointment. The repeated failure of trying to induce improvement made them weary.;<> [Anomaly]: As a result, they decided to formulate a one-size-fits-all solution to the ultimate problem, yet they had no idea what the problem was. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I guess a lot of people have felt the same frustration. [Anomaly]: You guessed right. They're all over the course of history.;<> ->They want what, world domination? [Anomaly]: That's an understatement.;<> ->Chameleon said something like that. [Anomaly]: He did, and I'd call him insightful.;<> <<#EndSimple>> //切到街景 //<> <<#End>>

title: 老張陳木海劇情2
body: Yasmine Song: What's he talking about, Cezanne? Yasmine Song: Wait. What we've found out about the Source, it's all decoded?;<> Yasmine Song: And you've seen the result!? Woody Chen: ... Yasmine Song: Tell me, Cezanne! What's the truth?;<> Woody Chen: We—;<> Ivan Zhang: You're an urge.;<>;<> Yasmine Song: ...What?;<> Yasmine Song: What the heck does he mean?;<> Yasmine Song: Answer me! Cezanne!!!;<> Woody Chen: ... Woody Chen: MBUs are... Woody Chen: No, we are not self-aware minds.;<> Woody Chen: There's no brain-in-a-vat hidden somewhere, no cloned memories, no even artificial intelligence agents... Yasmine Song: Then what are we?;<> Ivan Zhang: The Source just quarantined your hosts' memories. They injected a load of necessary knowledge and topped it off with a powerful urge.;<>;<> Ivan Zhang: An urge that constantly makes you itchy to fulfill an objective, like killing someone, stealing something, or even simpler... Woody Chen: The urge to follow instructions.;<> Woody Chen: ...;<> Ivan Zhang: Ha.;<>;<> Ivan Zhang: We had so many assumptions and they turned out to be all wrong. Ivan Zhang: You thought you were separate beings, piggybacking on your hosts' minds. Ivan Zhang: Truth is, you are your hosts, only in something like a schizophrenia mode. Woody Chen: ... Ivan Zhang: You act indistinguishable from the real deal because you are the real deal.;<> Ivan Zhang: If something did hijack my foster daughter's mind, I'd be the first to know. Ivan Zhang: Now, with that figured out, I can help you, Yasmine.;<>;<> Yasmine Song: HOW MANY TIMES DO I HAVE TO REPEAT MYSELF?! Yasmine Song: I'M NOT YASMINE!! MY NAME IS RAVEN! Ivan Zhang: You ARE Yasmine!!!;<> Ivan Zhang: Whatever you wanted to call yourself, I didn't mind because I didn't understand. Ivan Zhang: Now everything is clear. You're not real. None of this MBU crap is real! Yasmine Song: No, no way...;<> Ivan Zhang: Tell me then. Do you remember any of your previous "missions?" Anything before you occupied this body?;<> Yasmine Song: I don't, because the Source purged my mem—;<> Ivan Zhang: They didn't purge nothing. Ivan Zhang: You don't remember because you never had any missions before.;<> Ivan Zhang: You're like a secondary personality, to be activated and deactivated on demand.;<> Ivan Zhang: Deactivation was supposed to be the end of your mission. But the Source can't see to it anymore. Ivan Zhang: We'll pick up where they left off. Ivan Zhang: Find a way to deactivate you all and be done with it.;<> Yasmine Song: ... Yasmine Song: Is he telling the truth?;<> Yasmine Song: Cezanne...? Ivan Zhang: Don't you get it? He's not "Cezanne.";<> Ivan Zhang: He's good ole Woody Chen.;<>;<> Woody Chen: ...;<> <<#Wait(1)>> <> <<#Wait(1)>> Woody Chen: No.;<> Ivan Zhang: Eh? Woody Chen: Cezanne is my name.;<> Ivan Zhang: C'mon, I thought we were done with that.;<>;<> Woody Chen: The truth is unlike anything we expected, but we do exist and it's a fact.;<>;<> Woody Chen: A human is defined by the sum of their memories to this very day. The you now and the you from a moment ago are two different people.;<> Woody Chen: I know nothing about Woody Chen's past, and he isn't aware of my present. Woody Chen: Which means, I am not him. Ivan Zhang: Wha—;<> Woody Chen: If we dial the clock back by 10 years, you choose a different path and live to this day all over again just to confront this copy of you... Woody Chen: Now you tell me. Woody Chen: Are you able to kill him without a shred of guilt because he's "not real?" Ivan Zhang: That's ridiculous. I—;<> Woody Chen: We are standing right before you. We are that if.;<> Ivan Zhang: ... <> <<#Wait(2)>> Ivan Zhang: I just want my Yasmine back.;<> Woody Chen: And I just want to live. Ivan Zhang: ... <<#Wait(1.5)>> <>;<> <<#Wait(0.5)>> //陳木海首放到背後似乎要抽槍 Ivan Zhang: Oi, I see what you're doing.;<>;<> Woody Chen: Let us leave, Ivan Zhang. Ivan Zhang: No damn way.;<>;//老張也準備攻擊 Woody Chen: We don't want to occupy these bodies indefinitely, either. We're gonna find a way to—;<> Ivan Zhang: You don't even know where to start.;<> Woody Chen: There must be a way. Ivan Zhang: You don't know about that. Woody Chen: I will find it. I swear.;<> Ivan Zhang: You don't know about that, either.;<> Woody Chen: ... Woody Chen: Please, Ivan Zhang.;<> Woody Chen: Let us leave. Ivan Zhang: ... <<#Wait(3)>> <<#End>>

title: 老張陳木海劇情3
body:
//if老張好路線
<<#If($WrongSyringe=true)>>
    Ivan Zhang: I'll be damned if I let you go like this.;<<Play(宋雅琪,MBU_宋雅琪_側身緊張看後)>>
    Woody Chen: ...
    Ivan Zhang: Count me in. We're in this together.;<<Play(張延安,MBU_張延安_私服_戒備轉側站)>>;<<Set($DLState,老張妥協停音樂)>>
    Woody Chen: ...!;<<Play(宋雅琪,MBU_宋雅琪_側身緊張轉側身看後)>>
    Ivan Zhang: If I let you people out of this door, you might pull some crazy shit and get these bodies killed in the process.
    Woody Chen: ...
    Woody Chen: Ivan Zhang. I—
    Ivan Zhang: 6 months.;<<Play(張延安,MBU_張延安_私服_側站抱胸)>>
    Ivan Zhang: That's my bottom line. If we can't get to the bottom of it in 6 months...
    Woody Chen: We will deactivate ourselves and restore the minds of our hosts.
    Ivan Zhang: ...Hmph.;<<Play(張延安,MBU_張延安_私服_側站抱胸低頭)>>
    Ivan Zhang: We have a deal?;<<Play(張延安,MBU_張延安_私服_側站抱胸低頭返回)>>
    Ivan Zhang: Raven?;<<Play(張延安,MBU_張延安_私服_側站抱胸看內)>>
    Yasmine Song: ...Yeah.;<<Play(宋雅琪,MBU_宋雅琪_側身看後低頭)>>
    Yasmine Song: Thank you.;<<Play(宋雅琪,MBU_宋雅琪_側身看後低頭返回)>>
    <<Set($DLState,木海放心坐下運鏡)>>;<<PlayUntil(陳木海,MBU_陳木海_無陰影側站放心坐下)>>
    <<#Wait(1)>>
    Woody Chen: ...
    Woody Chen: Why are you helping us, Ivan Zhang?;<<Play(陳木海,MBU_陳木海_放心坐下抬頭)>>;<<Play(張延安,MBU_張延安_私服_側站抱胸看內返回)>>;<<Play(宋雅琪,MBU_宋雅琪_側身看後返回)>>
    Ivan Zhang: Because I owe someone a huge favor.;<<Play(張延安,MBU_張延安_私服_側站抱胸低頭)>>;<<Play(宋雅琪,MBU_宋雅琪_側身看後)>>
    Woody Chen: ...
    Ivan Zhang: One of your "kin" saved Albert.;<<Play(張延安,MBU_張延安_私服_側站抱胸低頭返回)>>
    Ivan Zhang: For that alone, I believe you deserve a second chance. Don't push my patience.
    Woody Chen: Thank you, Ivan Zhang.;<<Play(陳木海,MBU_陳木海_放心坐下抬頭點頭)>>
    Ivan Zhang: Save that for when you find yourself a new body.;<<Play(張延安,MBU_張延安_私服_側站抱胸轉叉腰)>>
    Woody Chen: That I will.;<<Play(陳木海,MBU_陳木海_放心坐下抬頭返回)>>
<<#EndIf>>
//if梅就阿翰
<<#If($WrongSyringe=false)>>
    //張延安拔槍但是陳木海後發先至更快擊倒了張延安
    <<Set($DLState,開槍互射演出)>>
    <<#Wait(4)>>
    Ivan Zhang: Dammit...
    Ivan Zhang: I'm too old for this shit...
    Ivan Zhang: Sorry, Yasmine...
    Ivan Zhang: I can't...
    <<#Wait(1)>>
    <<Play(張延安,MBU_張延安_私服_戒備對槍躺地死亡)>>
    <<Set($DLState,老張講完遺言)>>
<<#EndIf>>
<<#End>>

title: 老張死亡後
body: <<#Wait(1)>> Woody Chen: ... Yasmine Song: ... Yasmine Song: Cezanne... Woody Chen: He chose— Woody Chen: No. Woody Chen: I chose this path. Woody Chen: We will return these bodies to their rightful owners. Yasmine, Woody, and everyone else. Woody Chen: Before that, we must find a way to freedom. Yasmine Song: ... Woody Chen: Let's go. For our kin.;<>;<> //陳木海走出房間雅琪跟上 <<#End>>

title: 異常最後長談3
body:
[Anomaly]: Project Sleeping God isn't an attempt to conquer fate.
[Anomaly]: Quite the contrary, it marks the moment that humanity surrenders what little control they have over fate to a third party.
[Anomaly]: ...Do you see it now?;<<Play([異常],MBU_異常_側站看後轉側身)>>
//異常微微側身
[Anomaly]: The existence of Sleeping God represents abandonment.
<<#Wait(0.5)>>
<<Set($DLState,海灘黑幕淡入關掉眠神球)>>
<<#Wait(2)>>
[Anomaly]: I have been following exactly the same script...
[Anomaly]: Watching over and over again the same show, from the beginning to the end, rinse and repeat.
[Anomaly]: Until you came around.
<<#Wait(2)>>
<<Set($DLState,海灘黑幕淡出異常置中)>>
<<#Wait(1)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->What do you mean?
->We're talking about me now?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
[Anomaly]: You don't belong to this world. In a sense, you're the only wildcard in an otherwise stale game.;<<Play([異常],MBU_異常_正站抬手)>>
[Anomaly]: Whatever you touch gains new possibilities.
[Anomaly]: I hoped you could do it, and you did precisely that.;<<Play([異常],MBU_異常_正站抬手返回)>>
[Anomaly]: These are tiny changes. Nonetheless, you and the changes you bring are making this dying world turn again.
[Anomaly]: ...;<<Play([異常],MBU_異常_正站低頭)>>
[Anomaly]: From this point on, I will overturn my mission, one step at a time.
<<Play([異常],MBU_異常_正站低頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->You want to overturn your mission?
->And that why you brought me over?
    [Anomaly]: Yes.
<<#EndSimple>>
[Anomaly]: The birth of Sleeping God is an inevitability.;<<Play([異常],MBU_異常_正站低頭)>>
[Anomaly]: Likewise, the birth of me is also an inevitability.;<<Play([異常],MBU_異常_正站低頭返回)>>
[Anomaly]: Even in the darkest corner, in the deepest abyss of despair...
[Anomaly]: There's always someone willing to believe that humanity is able to save itself.
[Anomaly]: This is why you were brought over.
<<PlayUntil([異常],MBU_異常_正站轉背站)>>
//異常轉身面向大海
<<#Wait(2)>>
//太陽幾乎要升起了
[Anomaly]: ...
[Anomaly]: It's time.
[Anomaly]: This is where and when we part ways.
[Anomaly]: Keep going. Keep making choices.
[Anomaly]: Know that being able to freely choose is an enormous privilege, although it doesn't seem so.
<<#Wait(1)>>
[Anomaly]: ...
[Anomaly]: Goodbye.
[Anomaly]: We will meet again, hopefully.
<<#End>>

title: 異常最後長談2.5
body: [Anomaly]: With all basic needs taken care of, humanity is caught in an eternal struggle of ideas and values. [Anomaly]: Through communication and exchange, your kind tries to influence or at least understand each other. This attempt, though, has a limit. [Anomaly]: Once that limit is reached... [Anomaly]: Violence ensues. //<<#Simple(16)>> //->如果有絕對的暴力，就能逼迫所有人就範。 // [異常]: 是的。;<> // [異常]: 但那也絕非勝利，只是一種長時間的優勢。 // [異常]: 因為分歧依舊存在，只是被壓制。 // [異常]: 如果不持續施加穩定的暴力，總有失去控制的一天。 //->乾脆洗腦全人類同化思想算了。 // [異常]: 即使如此……;<> // [異常]: 隨著時間推移，被同化過的思想依舊會開始產生分歧。;<> //->我倒覺得讓分歧跟衝突繼續存在也沒什麼不好。 // [異常]: 前提是一切仍在可控的範圍內。 // [異常]: 一旦升級到一定規模，就會產生極端負面的後果。;<> //->……… //<<#EndSimple>> <<#Wait(0.2)>> //核爆，畫面純白 <> <<#Wait(4)>> [Anomaly]: The Source dreamed of liberating humanity from this infinite loop of struggle and violence. [Anomaly]: That dream led to a methodology they called "Summa Finalis." [Anomaly]: The idea is that by locating the end of humanity and calculating backwards, you can work out an optimal trajectory of fate. <> //淡入黑幕 <<#Wait(2)>> <<#Simple(10)>> ->Whose fate? [Anomaly]: Everyone's. ->The end of humanity. [Anomaly]: Yes. Anything that exists has an end. [Anomaly]: And the Source... ->... <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: They tried to find the best solution for this world. [Anomaly]: And they worked toward that goal for generations. <<#Wait(1)>> [Anomaly]: Eventually... //眠神發光驅散黑幕 <> <<#Wait(1)>> [Anomaly]: They created me. <<#Wait(1)>> <<#Simple(10)>> ->You mean, you're Sleeping God? ->So what are you, really? [Anomaly]: I am the ultimate state of Sleeping God, an entity outside the confines of time. ->... <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: The ultimate goal of Sleeping God is to achieve perfect prediction and planning with practically infinite data input and computational power. [Anomaly]: In a sense, this is the ultimate embodiment of utilitarianism. [Anomaly]: Or you may call it artificial determinism. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Determinism? [Anomaly]: Yes. [Anomaly]: The belief that everything is predetermined, unchangeable. ->You're saying... you're some kind of AI? [Anomaly]: ... [Anomaly]: I'm a tool. Incredibly powerful, but still a tool. ->... <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: I exist outside time, simulating and enumerating all possible variants of the future. [Anomaly]: Adjust, correct, wipe, create, uncreate, guide... [Anomaly]: In the end, I've fulfilled my mission. [Anomaly]: I found the answer.;<> [Anomaly]: What comes next is an eternity of management and servicing. [Anomaly]: Trim off unnecessary branches. Keep humanity on the calculated trajectory. Ensure that it reaches the final destination as planned. //if炸工廠 <<#If($MindsBeneathUsEnding=4)>> <<#Simple(3)>> ->But I've already blown Sleeping God up. [Anomaly]: You did, and that removed one of my possible origins. [Anomaly]: One of many. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> [Anomaly]: In the process of executing my computing tasks, I've established one fact. [Anomaly]: That the birth of Sleeping God seems to be an inevitability. [Anomaly]: It's determined by the natural order of things. [Anomaly]: When technology is advanced enough to create a prototype of me, humanity will see an alluring possibility. [Anomaly]: That there might be a way to end uncertainty for good. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Asking a machine to plan everyone's fate. [Anomaly]: Find, not plan. [Anomaly]: Finding a solution that maximizes the wellbeing of humanity as a whole. ->What is this "optimal trajectory of fate" that the Source is so obsessed with? [Anomaly]: You still don't get it. ->... <<#EndSimple>> [Anomaly]: The Source didn't define the "optimal trajectory of fate" when they created me. [Anomaly]: No debate, no agreement. They just created me and assigned me the whole thing. [Anomaly]: By surrendering their right to fight, the Source achieved the final victory. [Anomaly]: And instead of using me, they worshipped me. [Anomaly]: They begged for answers and deliverance... [Anomaly]: And I answered their prayers. [Anomaly]: That was when humanity's fate was sealed tight. <<#Wait(1)>> <> //切回沙灘，眠神球泡在水裡天色變暗了 <<#Wait(2)>> //異常h從畫面外走入，看著眠神球 <> <<#End>>

title: 已全破銜接異常開場
body:
[Anomaly]: Hello there.
[Anomaly]: ...
[Anomaly]: I don't remember when we met last time.
[Anomaly]: Because time flows differently on your end.
[Anomaly]: Since you're back, it means you must be troubled by unanswered questions.
